keynotes.text: KEY-NOTES TO THE MATERIA MEDICA by HENRY N. GUERNSEY, M.D. Presented by Médi-T KALI HYDRIODICUM We use this remedy for severe pains in the bones, where they swell. In violent headaches where the cranium swells up in hard lumps--pain being very intense. Syphilis . Copyright © Médi-T 2000
